title: taraxacum vile
intro: Taraxacum vile, also known as the common dandelion or bitter dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum vile include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum vile is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and its roots are also used to make a coffee substitute.
